message:
feat(import): add skill generator for transforming classified blocks into SkillSpec

Implements the second half of the import pipeline: generating well-formed
SkillSpec from classified content blocks. Works with the parser from the
previous commit to enable importing unstructured prompts as skills.

Generator features:
- GeneratorConfig for min_confidence, unknown handling, deduplication
- ImportHints for caller-provided ID, name, domain, tags
- Block-to-section mapping (Rule→rules, Example→examples, etc.)
- Rule formatting with imperative normalization
- Example formatting with code extraction and title detection
- Checklist parsing for checkbox and numbered items
- Pitfall formatting with emoji/prefix stripping
- Metadata inference: ID, name, description, domain, tags
- Content deduplication via normalized text comparison
- Unknown block handling: AddToContext, TrackForReview, Discard
- Warnings and suggestions for user review
- Import statistics tracking

Formatting utilities in formatting.rs:
- normalize_to_imperative() - "You should always X" → "Always X"
- extract_code_blocks() - find fenced code with language detection
- parse_checklist() - checkbox and numbered items
- infer_domain() / infer_tags() - content keyword analysis
- slugify() - convert titles to URL-safe IDs

40 new tests for generator and formatting modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
